---
title: "The Corridor of Uncertainty"
---

Welcome to the **Corridor of Uncertainty**, a podcast at the intersection of maths & sport. Hosted by Dr Jess Hargreaves & Dr Rich Bingham, two mathematicians at the University of York.

This site provides an organised archive of all episodes, with enhanced content including:

- Episode summaries and overviews
- Interactive visualisations and code examples
- Supplementary resources and links
- Technical deep-dives

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 📺 Watch on YouTube
[Visit the official YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@CorridorOfUncertainty)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 📖 Browse Episodes
[Start with Episode 1](episodes/episode-001.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### ℹ️ About
[Learn more about the channel](about.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### 🔮 Upcoming
[See what's coming next](upcoming.qmd)
:::
:::
:::

:::

## Latest Episodes

::: {.callout-tip}
## Episode 7: \[Title TBD\]
*Published: \[Date TBD\]*

\[Brief description\]

[Watch on YouTube](https://youtube.com/...) | [Read More](episodes/episode-006.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Episode 6: Can Maths Predict Curling Games?
*Published: \[Date TBD\]*

\[Brief description\]

[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/H2lbiTPuMhc?si=dRs9z6LJIOZUXuI-) | [Read More](episodes/episode-006.qmd)
:::
